name: ProjectHephaestus
description: Shared tooling and commands for the HomericIntelligence agentic ecosystem

plugins.name: hephaestus
plugins.description: Shared tooling plugin for the HomericIntelligence ecosystem (23 skills). Routing/orchestration: /skill-advisor (task routing), /advise (search skills registry), /learn (capture session learnings), /myrmidon-swarm (hierarchical agent orchestration). Workflow: /brainstorm (design before code), /test-driven-development (RED-GREEN-REFACTOR), /systematic-debugging (root cause first), /verification (evidence before claims), /git-worktrees (isolated workspaces), /finish-branch (branch completion), /code-review (Sonnet reviewer + feedback). Auditing: /repo-analyze, /repo-analyze-quick, /repo-analyze-strict and their full-coverage swarm variants /repo-analyze-full, /repo-analyze-quick-full, /repo-analyze-strict-full, plus /review-pr-strict (PR alignment audit). Maintenance: /worktree-cleanup (audit + prune worktrees without deleting branches), /tidy (rebase all branches with swarm conflict resolution). Knowledge skills: create-reusable-utilities, github-actions-python-cicd, python-repo-modernization.
